Function.Inference: Main linear body starting the track, ends with a double barline at bar 17.
Second linear section with dolce marking, ends with a double barline at bar 37.
Third linear section, returning to the opening material, ends with |] at bar 54.

Section.Inference: First main theme marked Tranquillo with a disjointed melody and sparse accompaniment.
Contrasting B theme marked dolce with continuous flowing accompaniment and lyrical melody.
Return of the A theme, closing the track.
